# Flutter project Windows setup files (auto-generated by Flutter init)
# 
# This file configures the Windows desktop build.
# Generated files are automatically included - no manual configuration needed.

# For more information about Flutter Windows development:
# https://github.com/google/flutter-desktop-embedding

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(btf_resume LANGUAGES CXX)

set(BINARY_NAME "btf_resume")

cmake_policy(SET CMP0063 NEW)

set(CMAKE_SUFFIX_VARIABLES
  CMAKE_C_FLAGS
  CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS
)
foreach(SUFFIX SHARED MODULE EXE)
  foreach(LANG C CXX)
    set(CMAKE_${LANG}_FLAGS_INIT "${CMAKE_${LANG}_FLAGS_INIT} /W4 /WX /permissive-")
  endforeach()
endforeach()

set(PROJECT_SOURCES
  "runner/main.cpp"
  "runner/utils.cpp"
  "runner/utils.h"
  "runner/win32_window.cpp"
  "runner/win32_window.h"
)

add_executable(${BINARY_NAME} WIN32 ${PROJECT_SOURCES})
target_compile_definitions(${BINARY_NAME} PRIVATE "NOMINMAX")
target_link_libraries(${BINARY_NAME} PRIVATE flutter flutter_wrapper_app)

add_custom_command(
  TARGET ${BINARY_NAME} POST_BUILD
  COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -P
    ${FLUTTER_ROOT}/packages/flutter_tools/bin/windows/plug_in_finished.cmake
)
